title: How to Apply for Paid Family and Medical Leave (PFML) — Massachusetts DFML
description: MA DFML how-to page walking applicants through the PFML application: employer notification (30 days recommended), documents to gather (government ID, SSN/ITIN, employer EIN, bank info, provider certification), application methods (online at paidleave.mass.gov or by phone), and the employer-review timeline (notified within 5 days; 10 business days to respond). Also covers appeals and intermittent leave.

source.publisher: Massachusetts Department of Family and Medical Leave (DFML)

notes: DEADLINES: employer notice ≥ 30 days before leave start (or as soon as practicable); appeals within 10 days of the DFML decision; extension requests within 30 days after the current leave ends. Portal paidleave.mass.gov; Contact Center (833) 344-7365.
